emails.subject: RE: Master Netting Agreement Assignments
emails.body: RE: Master Netting Agreement Assignments Marie, Can you please let me know which of these Agreements involve Enron Canada Corp.? Thanks. MRC To: Aronowitz, Alan; Clark, Morris; Davis, Angela; Del vecchio, Peter; Douglas, Stephen H.; Evans, Mark (London Legal); Gray, Barbara N.; Hansen, Leslie; Heard, Marie; Hendry, Brent; Hodge, Jeffrey T.; Jones, Tana; Keohane, Peter; Koehler, Anne C.; Lech Kalembka (E-mail); Leite, Francisco Pinto; McCullough, Travis; Mellencamp, Lisa; Murphy, Harlan; Murray, Julia; Nemec, Gerald; Portz, David; Rick Antonoff (E-mail); Rohauer, Tanya; Sager, Elizabeth; Sayre, Frank; Shackleton, Sara; Simons, Paul; St. Clair, Carol; Van Hooser, Steve; Viverito, John; Williams, Jason R (Credit)

emails.subject: RE: Master Netting Agreement Assignments
emails.body: Sure, once we figure it out, I'll let you know. To: Heard, Marie

emails.subject: RE: Master Netting Agreement Assignments
emails.body: Morris: So far these are the ones we know involve Enron Canada Corp. Dynegy Canada Inc. El Paso Merchant Energy Canada Inc. El Paso Merchant Energy, L.P. BP Canada Energy Company Let me know if you need anything else. Marie To: Heard, Marie

emails.subject: RE: Master Netting Agreement Assignments
emails.body: Marie, Thanks for your response. Please keep me posted as we additional counterparties. MRC To: Clark, Morris
